ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing item (e.g., pants, shirt, dress) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the clothing item */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the clothing item */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the clothing item (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the clothing item (e.g., Adult, Kids, Teen) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of the clothing item (e.g., Solid, Stripes, Floral) */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the clothing item */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is headquartered */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "style_description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the style (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the style (e.g., Adult, Kids, Teen) */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the style */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the style was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 0, 2, 4) */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing item (e.g., pants, shirt, dress) */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the size */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the size (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the size (e.g., Adult, Kids, Teen) */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* International equivalent size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., waist, hip, thigh, leg opening, front rise) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the measurement (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the measurement (e.g., Adult, Kids, Teen) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the measurement was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin, content manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_measurements" (
  "user_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user measurement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., waist, hip, thigh, leg opening, front rise) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date the user's measurements were taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the measurement was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the user */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation (0-1) */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date the fit recommendation was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recommendation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  "fit_accuracy" TEXT /* User's feedback on the fit accuracy (e.g., Fits Perfectly, Runs Small, Runs Large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level at which a reorder is needed */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the last reorder was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion record */,
  "from_unit" TEXT /* Unit to convert from (e.g., inches) */,
  "to_unit" TEXT /* Unit to convert to (e.g., centimeters) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor between the units */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the conversion record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_sizes" (
  "historical_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical size record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the size data was recorded */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., waist, hip, thigh, leg opening, front rise) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the historical size record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., waist, hip, thigh, leg opening, front rise) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the size standard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned */,
  "search_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the search query in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., preferred brand, preferred style) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
